nasb.text: For seven days the one of his sons who is priest in his stead shall put them on when he enters the tent of meeting to minister in the holy place.

esv.text: The son who succeeds him as priest, who comes into the tent of meeting to minister in the Holy Place, shall wear them seven days.

cnv.text: 亞倫的子孫中，凡是接替他作祭司的，每逢進入會幕在聖所裡事奉的時候，都要穿聖衣七天。

ccb.text: 接替亚伦做祭司的那位后裔，每次进会幕的圣所供职时，都要一连七天穿着圣衣。
